name: release-skill
description: Safe preparation and frozen GitHub/npm production publishing with full happy end verification

interface.shortDescription: Safe preparation and frozen GitHub/npm publishing
interface.longDescription: Prepares byte-faithful public snapshots without rewriting project source files and publishes approved frozen GitHub/npm artifacts. Full happy end verification confirms consumer installation from frozen Git ref.
defaultPrompt: Assess this project for release readiness.
Prepare a release plan for version 0.1.3.
Help me understand the release workflow.
